debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
ι : Type u_2
G : ι → Type u_3
inst✝¹ : Fintype ι
inst✝ : (i : ι) → Group (G i)
A : (i : ι) → Set (G i)
K : ι → ℝ
hA : ∀ (i : ι), IsApproximateSubgroup (K i) (A i)
F : (i : ι) → Finset (G i)
hF : ∀ (i : ι), ↑(F i).card ≤ K i
hFS : ∀ (i : ι), A i ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(F i) • A i
⊢ Set.univ.pi A ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(Fintype.piFinset F) • Set.univ.pi A

proof:
rw [pow_two]
      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨y, hy, z, hz, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_mul.1 hx
      choose f hf a ha hfa using fun i ↦ Set.mem_smul.1 (hFS i (by
        rw [pow_two]
        exact Set.mul_mem_mul (hy i trivial) (hz i trivial)))
      refine ⟨f, Fintype.mem_piFinset.2 hf, a, fun i _ ↦ ha i, funext hfa⟩
successful_attempts:
rw [pow_two]
      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨y, hy, z, hz, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_mul.1 hx
      choose f hf a ha hfa using fun i ↦ Set.mem_smul.1 (hFS i (by
        rw [pow_two]
        exact Set.mul_mem_mul (hy i trivial) (hz i trivial)))
      refine ⟨f, Fintype.mem_piFinset.2 hf, a, fun i _ ↦ ha i, funext hfa⟩
